no-wikipedia:Baños Termales de Aguas Cal.notes: No standalone English Wikipedia article exists for the hot baths at Aguas Calientes, Peru; they are described only within the broader Aguas Calientes, Peru town article (the 'Aguas Calientes Hot Springs' article is a different subject in Chile), so there is no qualifying same-subject standalone article to link.
